text_block_list.text:
One day, Daiwa Scarlet goes on a<n>picnic with her
classmates.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
No waaaaay! A suspension bridge?!<n>How are we
supposed to cross this?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
(Huh?! This has to be some kind of<n>joke! Those
little planks are spaced<n>way too far apart!)

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
(This is scary. But if I bow out now,<n>there'll be no
one to help the others!<n>...All right!)

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
We won't get anywhere at this rate!<n>Everyone,
hold onto my hand!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Phew... We all made it.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Geez, that was terrifying!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Right? I thought we were goners, to<n>be honest.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Come on, Scarlet. You had a blank<n>look on your
face that whole time.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume C
text_block_list.text:
Just like a model student to keep her<n>cool. I feel
like we can't even<n>compete.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Okay, onto our next spot. Can't wait<n>to see what
challenges we're gonna<n>have to deal with next! ♪

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Uh, wait, hold on. Honestly, I was<n>pretty—hey! Wait
up!
Woosh!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: What the heck? That makes it sound<n>like...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Like I'm some boring<n>stick-in-the-mud!

In the yard behind Tracen Academy,<n>the place
where everyone vents in<n>secret, Daiwa Scarlet
cries out.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I was super scared too, you know! I<n>just wanted
to be the most<n>reliable—the most dependable!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
It's not like I wanted to ruin their fun<n>at the picnic!
This is all so stupid!<n>Stupid! STUPID!

I figure out the gist of what happened<n>from her
yelling.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Grr! Fine. The next time somethingcrazy happens, I'll make sure I havethe most frightened reaction out ofeveryone!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Wait, would that be too much? I'd<n>feel pretty fake
doing that... Ugh, this<n>is so confusing...
choice_data_list: Um, do you mind if I say something?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
EEEEK! Where'd you come from?!<n>Tch! Did you
hear all of that?!

After all my eavesdropping, I decide<n>to offer her
some words of advice.
choice_data_list: I think practicing your reactions is a great idea.
Just stick with what feels natural to you.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Practice my reactions?! Ugh. So you<n>really heard
everything...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
But you're right. Thank you. I'll go<n>watch
UmaTube for some pointers...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: Get a load of this. You wouldn'tbelieve what happened to meduring training.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume C
text_block_list.text: Wowww, that's so wild.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
(Ooh! This is my chance! Time to put<n>my reaction
training to use!)

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
OH. EM. GEE! That is, like, soooo<n>crazy! Like, get
out! I'm on the edge<n>of my seat here!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: Uh, are you okay, Scarlet?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Whaddya think? I sound super<n>engaged, right?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume C
text_block_list.text: Hmm, I'm not sure that's how I'd<n>put it.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume C
text_block_list.text:
...You really went all-in on the act,<n>though. That
was such a good<n>UmaTuber impression, it caught
me<n>off guard.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: A-a good what?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
(Ugh. I guess those UmaTuber<n>reaction videos
aren't the best<n>reference after all. But still...)

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I won't give up! Just you wait, I'mgoing to be the most fun personaround! With the best reactions ever!

Daiwa Scarlet's sheer passion burns<n>as she
vows to start having a total<n>blast whenever
possible.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Whatever feels natural... Yeah, I<n>guess you're
right. I should just be<n>myself.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Thanks very much! I get it now!
Daiwa Scarlet speeds off. Then, a<n>few days later...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume C
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Scarlet! Did you hear? We're<n>gonna have a
surprise pop quiz next<n>class!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: A quiz? Really?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Well, no use panicking. I'll just take it<n>in stride
and think of it as a chance to<n>show what I can do.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume C
text_block_list.text: Whoa. Your composure never ceases<n>to impress...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Hey Scarlet, perfect timing. Just<n>wanted to let you
know...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I borrowed one of your scarves to<n>polish my
leather jacket. 'Kay,<n>thanks, seeya.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Excuse me?! What the heck wereyou thinking?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Who gave you permission to use my<n>scarf?! I'm
gonna use your jacket to<n>polish my scarf!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume C
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, Scarlet always seemed so<n>laid-back around
us...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah but it looks like she's got a<n>quick temper
with her friends. She's<n>funny.

Daiwa Scarlet, the normally unfazed<n>model
student, mercilessly lays into<n>one of her closest
friends.
